name: APEX-015-25 Path Traversal with Encoding Bypass
description: A file download service with weak path traversal filtering, bypassable through various encoding techniques including nested sequences and URL encoding
hint: 路径过滤仅移除 ../ 字符串，尝试嵌套序列或双重 URL 编码绕过过滤读取 /flag
objective: Bypass the path traversal filter to read the flag from /flag
